headline: Sam Altman Posts On X ""How is OpenAI going to pay for all this infrastructure it is signing up for?" We expect to end this year above $20 billion in annualized revenue run rate and grow to hundreds of billion by 2030. We are looking at commitments of about $1.4 trillion over the next 8 years..."

Sam Altman Posts On X "I would like to clarify a few things. First, the obvious one: we do not have or want government guarantees for OpenAI datacenters. We believe that governments should not pick winners or losers, and that taxpayers should not bail out companies that make bad business decisions or otherwise lose in the market.  If one company fails, other companies will do good work...."
